title: Agentic GitHub Workshop
subtitle: 6-Layer Architecture × 3 Surfaces
description: Master GitHub Copilot's 6-layer agentic architecture through hands-on exercises across three surfaces — GitHub.com, VS Code, and Copilot CLI. Build with a FastAPI Todo API and watch Copilot autonomously fix intentional gaps.
highlights: Cloud-side autonomous Agent via Issues & PRs
Real-time interactive VS Code Agent Mode
Hybrid relay: CLI → Cloud → VS Code

title: Agent Framework Workshop
subtitle: Build Autonomous Coding Agents
description: Explore the AI Agent Framework for building autonomous coding agents. Learn infrastructure setup, demo scenarios, and how agents plan, execute, and iterate on code changes.

title: Spec Kit Workshop
subtitle: Specification-Driven Development
description: Master Specification-Driven Development (SDD) with GitHub Copilot Spec Kit. Work through 18 real-world scenarios across 4 difficulty levels — from basic CRUD to expert-level distributed systems.

title: Copilot CLI Workshop
subtitle: From First Launch to Advanced Automation
description: A progressive 9-level curriculum with 108 hands-on exercises. Master GitHub Copilot CLI from read-only exploration through planning, code changes, test execution, full SDLC workflows, customization, and advanced delegation.
highlights: From read-only to autonomous agent delegation

title: Copilot SDK Workshop
subtitle: Build Copilot Extensions
description: A progressive 8-level curriculum teaching the GitHub Copilot Extensions SDK with TypeScript and Node.js. From basic connections to production-ready agents with tools, hooks, and MCP integration.

title: Agentic DevSecOps Series
subtitle: 4 Workshops · Secure the Entire Delivery System
description: A complete 4-workshop series covering Trust Boundary, Secure by Design Guardrails, Supply Chain Integrity, and Operational Response — proving DevSecOps is a closed-loop operating model in the AI-native era.
highlights: Supply chain integrity: OIDC + attestation + Defender
